verification_gate: envctl migration database + nu_plugin CodeDB are implemented and a fresh end-to-end run PROVES the capability: import 4 real systems (.kb GitKB, .meta, .handoff, .idd rusty-idd) into the database and export ONE unified .idd tree with zero downgrade and zero feature loss - agent-driven, no human step; acceptance A-E green, replay-verified, rerun-deterministic.
proof_summary: Follow-on to IDD-UNIFY-000 (the plan): the execution substrate is BUILT and the capability is TESTED. envctl gained an event-sourced migration database ('envctl migration', engine module migration_db on pure-Rust redb - no-c.sh gate PASS, NOT SQLite): all 15 package-DDL entities, fail-closed run/operation state machines, hash-chained append-only event ledger, R3+ approval gate per AGENT_CONTROL_PROTOCOL, the sql/002 views, replay verification (verify-only recomputes target/recipe/contract hashes, full event chain, command hashes, evidence/artifact file hashes, approval decisions, reproducibility hash). CodeDB's report-only CLI was wired to its redb store: 'codedb capture' persists exact bytes as content-addressed sha256 blobs (+unix modes), 'codedb materialize' re-emits byte-for-byte with per-file roundtrip checks; unpersistable entries become capture_gaps rows. nu_plugin_codedb registered in nu 0.113.1 (19 plugin commands). ONE command (nu idd_unify_e2e.nu <work>) drives the E2E on real snapshots (nu_plugin/.kb 419 files, meta manifests 2, envctl/.handoff 340, rusty-idd/.idd 83): capture x4 -> baselines as evidence -> wikilink/task-twin graph edges (566 kb wikilinks) -> R3 export DENIED by agent-reviewer while evidence was absent (deny-by-default), APPROVED after verifying 4/4 baselines + 4/4 store hashes -> unified .idd/{kb,handoff,meta,+idd-contract-surfaces} with .kb/.handoff compat symlinks -> content-hash lock. Acceptance: A byte parity IDENTICAL 4/4 (external sha256sum manifests); B git-kb served 133/133 docs through the .kb symlink, hf rendered 56 tasks from the copied ledger, rusty-idd validate reports identical findings on unified vs pristine source, meta manifests parse; C feature-verb matrix 9 rows 0 unmapped; D 1 gap (.cache/gitkb.sock unix socket) enumerated + agent-approved; E deny-then-approve recorded as ledger events with reviewer session in _agent_sessions. Replay verify-only --verify-files 11/11. Second fresh run reproduced the identical tree lock 3f92a5dfa9291853e904b302bea60ef89362f62452c65304daacdce118ff0a2f (deterministic re-render). Runtime deltas recorded: CodeDB task CSV stale vs code (crates implemented, binaries build); codedb doctor recommends nu 0.112.2 but plugin protocol is 0.113.1; installed git-kb misresolves KB root from a worktree cwd (repo-rule warning confirmed live); envctl catalog scan test flakes under parallel cargo test (passes isolated + at base).

live_commands.purpose: envctl migration DB acceptance tests + CI gates
live_commands.command: cargo test -p envctl-engine migration_db; cargo test -p envctl --bin envctl; bash ci/gates/no-c.sh; bash ci/gates/shape.sh; cargo clippy -p envctl-engine -p envctl -- -D warnings
output: migration_db: 9 passed; 0 failed (R3 gate block->agent approve->run, deny terminal, chained events, idempotent ops, replay verify)
envctl bin: 23 passed; 0 failed (incl every_command_has_long_about_and_examples over the migration tree)
NO-C GATE PASS (redb in graph; rustls ring-only; zero C-SQLite) | SHAPE GATE PASS | clippy clean

live_commands.purpose: codedb capture/materialize roundtrip on a real .kb snapshot
live_commands.command: codedb capture sources/kb --store db/kb.redb; codedb materialize --store db/kb.redb --out-dir reemit/kb; diff baselines/kb.sha256 <(manifest reemit/kb)
output: capture_summary: files_captured=419 bytes=25456246 gaps=1 (.cache/gitkb.sock unix socket, enumerated)

live_commands.command: nu 0.113.1: plugin add/use --plugin-config nu-home/plugins.msgpackz; plugin list; codedb fs entries --repo sources/kb | where kind == 'file' | length
